titleStmt.title: SII 19.243: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 243. (A.R. No. 366 of 1906.) KUḌUMIYĀMALAI, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SECOND prākāra, ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is stated to be a copy of an old document like No. 198 above. It records a deposit of 7(1/2) kaḻañju of gold by the temple with some specified persons who agreed to supply ghee for each month's requirement of a lamp in the temple of Tirunalakkuṉṟattu-Mahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Ollaiyūrkkūṟṟattu neriñcikkuḻi kopparakecaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10- vatu Ivvūr kaṇakku
m Eṇṇai tirunalakkuṉṟattu makātevar paṇṭārattu tiṅkaḷ nāḻiney Aṭṭa koṇṭa poṉ Irukaḻai
ñcum meṟppaṭiyūr kulattukaiceṉtaṉ tiṅkaḷ nāḻi Uriy ney Aṭṭa koṇṭa poṉ kaḻañcaraiyum
meṟpaṭiyūr kulattukaṉkaṭṭi tiṅkaḷ nāḻi ney Aṭṭa koṇṭa poṉ kaḻaiñcum meṟppaṭiyūr kulattu
kaipirāṉ tiṅkaḷ nāḻi ney Aṭṭa koṇṭa poṉ kaḻaiñcum meṟppaṭiyūrk kiḻavaṉ maṟavaṉ tiṅ
kaḷ Irunāḻi ney Aṭṭa koṇṭa Irukaḻaiñcum Āka Ippoṉ Eḻukaḻañcaraiyum koṇṭamai kku kalli
l veṭṭikkuṭuttom Itu paṉmākeśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 19.243 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
